title: Bring up amd-Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-MXFP4 on tokenspeed (AMD MI350/gfx950)
description: Make the MXFP4-quantized Qwen3.5 hybrid-MoE model load, run, and generate coherent output on AMD MI350X with TP=4. Tracks GDN AMD prefill wiring, quant-exclusion fixes, smg gateway version-skew workaround, and numerical coherence.

title: Implement TLX async FAv3 kernel
description: Implement and optimize an async_fav3 TLX flash-attention kernel for MI350x. Use the Gluon CDNA4 FAv3 kernel and older TLX pipelined implementation as references, benchmark against current TLX/Gluon shapes, and iterate on performance.
